Home.heroDesc: An unofficial guide site covering the latest patch tier list, and full champion stats and skill details.
Home.metaDesc: Highest win rate champions per role (Meta)
Home.metaUpdated: Last Updated: 2026/05/28 / Data Source: Chinese Official Site (Diamond+)
Home.noticeItemsAndRunes: Currently only champion data is available, but item and rune databases will be added in the future!
Home.noticeContact: If you find any incorrect data (such as skill numbers), please let us know via the Contact page.
Home.qaTierDesc: Current meta win rates and pick rates.
Home.qaCalcDesc: Calculate actual damage considering items and defense.

Calculator.title: Damage & EHP Calculator
Calculator.description: Calculate Effective HP and exact damage with penetration/reduction.
Calculator.disclaimerText: This calculator processes the standard order of penetration and reduction. However, slight discrepancies from actual in-game values may occur due to complex overlapping mechanics.

Metadata.defaultTitle: Wild Rift Hub - Tier List & Patch Notes
Metadata.description: The comprehensive information site for League of Legends: Wild Rift, featuring the latest tier lists, patch notes, and champion matchups.
